patch.value: Add the SDK author-time analyzer to src/sdk/compose.ts. Pure + synchronous: given an ExtensionManifest and a target {pmVersion, pmMaxVersionExceededMode?}, return {compatible, findings[], pmVersion} where each finding mirrors a loader bound outcome (pm_min_version_invalid/unchecked/unmet, pm_max_version_invalid/unchecked/exceeded/exceeded_warn) with severity error|warning. Delegates to the shared version-compat core so it agrees with the loader by construction. Re-export from the SDK barrel.

value.note: checkExtensionManifestCompatibility + ExtensionManifestCompatibility* types (auto-exported via barrel export *)
Author-time compat check subsection + helper lists

patch.value: Shipped checkExtensionManifestCompatibility(manifest, target) in src/sdk/compose.ts: pure synchronous analyzer returning {compatible, findings[], pmVersion}; each finding mirrors a loader bound outcome (pm_min/max_version invalid/unchecked/unmet/exceeded/exceeded_warn). Delegates to shared version-compat core so it agrees with the loader by construction. 100% cov.
